name: gaming-gauntlet-ui-kit
description: Reusable Gaming Gauntlet UI kit extracted from the retired app.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/core && npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/api && npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/ui && npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/web
scripts.deploy:d1:apply: wrangler d1 migrations apply gaming-gauntlet-v1 --config wrangler.api.toml --remote
scripts.deploy:d1:list: wrangler d1 migrations list gaming-gauntlet-v1 --config wrangler.api.toml --remote
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run deploy:check && npm run deploy:api:dry-run && npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/web
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/web && cd apps/web && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name gaming-gauntlet
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/core && npm run test --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/api && npm run test --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @gaming-gauntlet/web
scripts.verify: npm run deploy:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
